---
title: "Schedule and Material"
author: "Davi Moreira"
# date-modified: "last-modified"
# date: "2026-08-01"
# date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
editor: visual
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .overflow-table {
    font-size: 0.85rem; /* Smaller font for compact display */
    width: 100%; /* Ensure the table fits within page width */
    line-height: 1.2; /* Tighter line spacing */
  }
  .overflow-table th, .overflow-table td {
    padding: 0.3rem; /* Reduce padding for compact layout */
    text-align: left; /* Left-align for readability */
    word-wrap: break-word; /* Wrap long text within cells */
    vertical-align: top; /* Align cell content to the top */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(1), .overflow-table td:nth-child(1) {
    width: 0%; /* Increase width of the first column */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(4), .overflow-table td:nth-child(4) {
    width: 25%; /* Increase width of the first column */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(6), .overflow-table td:nth-child(6) {
    width: 8%; /* Increase width of the first column */
  }
  .below-table {
    font-size: 0.85rem; /* Match the font size of the table */
    line-height: 1.2; /* Match line height */
    margin-top: 1rem; /* Add spacing above the text */
  }
</style>
```

<br>

::: overflow-table
| **Week** | **Day** | **Date** | **Topic** | **Book Sections\*** | **Slides** | **Data** | **Assignment\*\*** | **Supplementary Materials** |
|------|------|------|------|------|------|------|------|------|
| **1** | **M** | Aug 24 | **T01 · Descriptive Statistics I** | Syl.; Ch. 1, 3 | [slides](/lecture_slides/01_chapter_data_statistics/01_chapter_data_statistics.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | \- [**Video**: Hans Rosling's 200 Countries, 200 Years](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jbkSRLYSojo){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: What Is Statistics (Crash Course Statistics #1)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sxQaBpKfDRk){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: Individuals, Variables, and Categorical Data (Khan Academy)](https://www.khanacademy.org/math/ap-statistics/analyzing-categorical-ap/xfb5d8e68:language-variation-variables/v/identifying-individuals-variables-and-categorical-variables-in-a-data-set){target="_blank"} |
| **1** | **W** | Aug 26 | **T02 · Descriptive Statistics II** | Ch. 3 | [slides](/lecture_slides/02_chapter_descriptive_statistics/02_chapter_descriptive_statistics.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | \- [**Video**: Summarizing and Graphing Numerical Data](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xm0PPtci3JE){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: Mean, Variance, and Standard Deviation (StatQuest)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SzZ6GpcfoQY){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: Z-score Introduction (Khan Academy)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5S-Zfa-vOXs){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Reading**: Exploratory Data Analysis (OpenIntro)](https://openintro-ims.netlify.app/exploratory-data-analysis){target="_blank"} |
| **1** | **F** | Aug 28 | **T03 · Probability** | Ch. 4 | [slides](/lecture_slides/03_chapter_probability/03_chapter_probability.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | \- [**Video**: Addition Rule for Probability (Khan Academy)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QE2uR6Z-NcU){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: An Introduction to Conditional Probability (jbstatistics)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bgCMjHzXTXs){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Reading**: Probability (OpenIntro)](https://www.openintro.org/go/?id=stat_os4_probability_chapter){target="_blank"} |
| **2** | **M** | Aug 31 | **T04 · Decision Analysis** | Ch. 19 | [slides](/lecture_slides/04_chapter_decision_analysis/04_chapter_decision_analysis.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) · **Homework 1 assigned** | \- [**Video**: Decision Making Under Uncertainty: Maximax, Maximin, Minimax Regret](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NQ-mYn9fPag){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: Decision Trees and Expected Monetary Value](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ydvnVw80I_8){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: Bayes' Theorem, the Geometry of Changing Beliefs (3Blue1Brown)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HZGCoVF3YvM){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Reading**: Decision Trees and Expected Value (OpenLearn)](https://www.open.edu/openlearn/money-business/decision-trees-and-dealing-uncertainty/content-section-4.1){target="_blank"} |
| **2** | **W** | Sep 02 | **T05 · Discrete Probability Distributions** | Ch. 5 | [slides](/lecture_slides/05_chapter_discrete_probability_distributions/05_chapter_discrete_probability_distributions.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | \- [**Video**: Expected Value of a Discrete Random Variable (Khan Academy)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qafPcWNUiM8){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: An Introduction to the Binomial Distribution (jbstatistics)](https://www.jbstatistics.com/introduction-to-the-binomial-distribution/){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: An Introduction to the Poisson Distribution (jbstatistics)](https://www.jbstatistics.com/introduction-to-the-poisson-distribution/){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Reading**: OpenIntro Statistics (free textbook)](https://www.openintro.org/book/os/){target="_blank"} |
| **2** | **F** | Sep 04 | **T05 · Discrete Probability Distributions** | Ch. 5 | [slides](/lecture_slides/05_chapter_discrete_probability_distributions/05_chapter_discrete_probability_distributions.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | . |
| **3** | **M** | Sep 07 | **LABOR DAY — No Class** | — | . | . | . | . |
| **3** | **W** | Sep 09 | **T06 · Continuous Probability Distributions** | Ch. 6 | [slides](/lecture_slides/06_chapter_continuous_probability_distributions/06_chapter_continuous_probability_distributions.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | \- [**Video**: The Normal Distribution (OpenIntro)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S_p5D-YXLS4){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: Standardizing Normal Variables with Z-scores](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4R8xm19DmPM){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Reading**: How to Calculate Z-scores (Khan Academy)](https://www.khanacademy.org/math/statistics-probability/modeling-distributions-of-data/z-scores/a/z-scores-review){target="_blank"} |
| **3** | **F** | Sep 11 | **T06 · Continuous Probability Distributions** | Ch. 6 | [slides](/lecture_slides/06_chapter_continuous_probability_distributions/06_chapter_continuous_probability_distributions.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | . |
| **4** | **M** | Sep 14 | **T07 · Sampling Distributions & Interval Estimation** | Ch. 7, 8 | [slides](/lecture_slides/07_chapter_interval_estimation/07_chapter_interval_estimation.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) · **Homework 2 assigned** | \- [**Video**: Point Estimates (OpenIntro)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oLW_uzkPZGA){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: The Central Limit Theorem (StatQuest)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YAlJCEDH2uY){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: The t-distribution](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uVEj2uBJfq0){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Reading**: Inference for a Single Mean (OpenIntro)](https://openintro-ims.netlify.app/inference-one-mean){target="_blank"} |
| **4** | **W** | Sep 16 | **T07 · Sampling Distributions & Interval Estimation** | Ch. 7, 8 | [slides](/lecture_slides/07_chapter_interval_estimation/07_chapter_interval_estimation.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | . |
| **4** | **F** | Sep 18 | **Midterm Review** | Cumulative (to date) | . | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | . | . |
| **5** | **M** | Sep 21 | **In-Class Midterm** | — | . | . | **Midterm Exam** | . |
| **5** | **W** | Sep 23 | **T08 · Hypothesis Testing I** | Ch. 9 | [slides](/lecture_slides/08_chapter_hypothesis_tests/08_chapter_hypothesis_tests.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | \- [**Video**: Hypothesis Testing Fundamentals (OpenIntro)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NVbPE1_Cbx8){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: Hypothesis Testing and the Null Hypothesis (StatQuest)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0oc49DyA3hU){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: p-values and How to Interpret Them (StatQuest)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vemZtEM63GY){target="_blank"} |
| **5** | **F** | Sep 25 | **T08 · Hypothesis Testing I** | Ch. 9 | [slides](/lecture_slides/08_chapter_hypothesis_tests/08_chapter_hypothesis_tests.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | . |
| **6** | **M** | Sep 28 | **T09 · Hypothesis Testing II — Two Populations** | Ch. 10 | [slides](/lecture_slides/09_chapter_hypothesis_tests_two_populations/09_chapter_hypothesis_tests_two_populations.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | \- [**Video**: Two-sample t-test for a Difference of Means (Khan Academy)](https://www.khanacademy.org/math/ap-statistics/xfb5d8e68:inference-quantitative-means/two-sample-t-test-means/v/two-sample-t-test-for-difference-of-means){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: Hypotheses for Paired and Two-sample t-tests (Khan Academy)](https://www.khanacademy.org/math/ap-statistics/xfb5d8e68:inference-quantitative-means/two-sample-t-test-means/v/example-of-hypotheses-for-paired-and-2-sample-t-tests){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: Test for a Difference in Two Proportions (Khan Academy)](https://www.khanacademy.org/math/ap-statistics/xfb5d8e68:inference-categorical-proportions/two-sample-z-test-proportions/v/hypothesis-test-for-difference-in-proportions){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Reading**: Inference for Comparing Paired Means (OpenIntro)](https://openintro-ims.netlify.app/inference-paired-means.html){target="_blank"} |
| **6** | **W** | Sep 30 | **T10 · Simple Regression** | Ch. 14 | [slides](/lecture_slides/10_chapter_simple_regression/10_chapter_simple_regression.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | \- [**Video**: Line Fitting, Residuals, and Correlation (OpenIntro)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mPvtZhdPBhQ){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: Linear Regression (StatQuest)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7ArmBVF2dCs){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Reading**: Linear Regression with a Single Predictor (OpenIntro)](https://openintro-ims.netlify.app/model-slr){target="_blank"} |
| **6** | **F** | Oct 02 | **T10 · Simple Regression** | Ch. 14 | [slides](/lecture_slides/10_chapter_simple_regression/10_chapter_simple_regression.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | . |
| **7** | **M** | Oct 05 | **T11 · Multiple Regression** | Ch. 15 | [slides](/lecture_slides/11_chapter_multiple_regression/11_chapter_multiple_regression.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) · **Homework 3 assigned** | \- [**Video**: Introduction to Multiple Regression (OpenIntro)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sQpAuyfEYZg){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: Multiple Regression (StatQuest)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EkAQAi3a4js){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Video**: Dummy Variables in Multiple Regression (Brandon Foltz)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fTfMdCQJz4s){target="_blank"}<br>- [**Reading**: Linear Regression with Multiple Predictors (OpenIntro)](https://openintro-ims.netlify.app/model-mlr){target="_blank"} |
| **7** | **W** | Oct 07 | **T11 · Multiple Regression** | Ch. 15 | [slides](/lecture_slides/11_chapter_multiple_regression/11_chapter_multiple_regression.html){target="_blank"} | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | Group case (Brightspace) | . |
| **7** | **F** | Oct 09 | **Final Review** | Cumulative | . | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | . | . |
| **—** | — | TBD | **Final Exam (Details in the Course Syllabus)** | Cumulative | . | [all datasets (.zip)](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) | **Final Exam** | . |
:::

::: below-table
\* Section numbers refer to chapters in the course textbook: Anderson, Sweeney, Williams, Camm & Cochran, *Statistics for Business and Economics*, 14th ed.

\*\* **Assignment** is the graded work tied to each session: the in-class **group case** (worked in your fixed group and submitted on Brightspace before class ends), plus the dates the three **individual homeworks** are assigned and the **midterm/final** are held. Slides open in the **Slides** column; the [**course datasets (.zip)**](/data/qm6700_datasets.zip) (each topic's file plus every in-class group-case file) download from the **Data** column. **Supplementary Materials** are optional, free videos and readings to reinforce each topic; more may be posted to Brightspace as the term goes on.
:::
